title: Cover
content: Veltra — Predictive maintenance for mid-size manufacturing plants

title: Problem
content: Unplanned equipment downtime costs mid-size manufacturers an average of $22,000 per hour. Our survey of 40 plant managers found 68% rely on fixed maintenance schedules, not real failure signals, and experience at least one unplanned stoppage per month.

title: Solution
content: Veltra attaches low-cost vibration and thermal sensors to existing machinery and uses a failure-prediction model to alert maintenance teams 5-10 days before a breakdown, directly replacing the fixed-schedule guesswork that causes those stoppages.

title: Product
content: Plug-in sensor kit (15-minute install, no rewiring) + a dashboard showing per-machine risk scores and a recommended maintenance window.

title: Market Opportunity
content: Bottom-up: 38,000 mid-size manufacturing plants in our target region x avg. 12 critical machines x $400/machine/year = $182M serviceable market in this region alone.

title: Business Model
content: Hardware sold near cost ($45/sensor); recurring SaaS fee of $400/machine/year for monitoring and predictions. 86% gross margin on the recurring revenue.

title: Traction / Early Signals
content: Week-over-week active machines monitored: 40 (wk1) -> 95 (wk4) -> 210 (wk8) -> 410 (wk12) across 6 paying pilot plants. Two pilots have already converted to annual contracts ($14,400 ARR combined).

title: Go-to-Market Strategy
content: Direct sales to plant operations managers via 3 regional manufacturing associations we already have intro access to, then expand through word-of-mouth within those networks before scaling paid channels.

title: Team
content: CEO: led predictive-maintenance rollout across 12 plants at a Tier-1 automotive supplier. CTO: built the vibration-analysis ML pipeline used in two published industrial IoT case studies.

title: Ask
content: Raising $800K seed to hire 2 field engineers and convert our current pilot pipeline (14 plants in active trials) into paying contracts within 9 months, targeting $250K ARR.
